app.name: Wave Terminal
about.title: About Wave Terminal
connection.wshNotInstalled: wsh is not installed for this connection
ai.title: Wave AI
ai.dropFilesDesc: Images, PDFs, and text/code files supported
ai.welcomeDesc: Wave AI is your terminal assistant with context. I can read your terminal output, analyze widgets, access files, and help you solve problems faster.
ai.contextOnDesc: When ON, I can read your terminal and analyze widgets.
ai.contextOffDesc: When OFF, I'm sandboxed with no system access.
ai.dragDrop: Drag & drop files or images for analysis
ai.betaNotice: BETA: Free to use. Daily limits keep our costs in check.
ai.builderPlaceholder: What would you like to build...
ai.filesRejected: {{count}} file(s) rejected (unsupported type): {{names}}. Supported: images, PDFs, and text/code files.
ai.byok.title: New: BYOK & Local AI Support
ai.byok.description: Wave AI now supports bring-your-own-key (BYOK) with OpenAI, Google Gemini, Azure, and OpenRouter, plus local models via Ollama, LM Studio, and other OpenAI-compatible providers.
ai.backup.successDesc: The file ... has been restored to its previous state.
ai.backup.failedDesc: An error occurred while restoring the backup:
ai.backup.title: Restore File Backup
ai.backup.description: This will restore ... to its state before this edit was made
ai.backup.warning: Any changes made by this edit and subsequent edits will be lost.
ai.telemetry.title: Wave AI
ai.telemetry.description: Wave AI is free to use and provides integrated AI chat that can interact with your widgets, help you with code, analyze files, and assist with your terminal workflows.
ai.telemetry.heading: Telemetry keeps Wave AI free
ai.telemetry.para1: To keep Wave AI free for everyone, we require a small amount of anonymous usage data (app version, feature usage, system info).
ai.telemetry.para2: This helps us block abuse by automated systems and ensure it's used by real people like you.
ai.telemetry.para3: We never collect your files, prompts, keystrokes, hostnames, or personally identifying information. Wave AI is powered by OpenAI's APIs, please refer to OpenAI's privacy policy for details on how they handle your data.
ai.telemetry.byokInfo: For information about BYOK and local model support, see
ai.builder.title: WaveApp Builder
ai.builder.description: The WaveApp builder helps create wave widgets that integrate seamlessly into Wave Terminal.
config.title: Wave Config
config.invalidKeyPrefix: Invalid key "{{key}}": all top-level keys must start with "ai@"
config.invalidKeyChars: Invalid key "{{key}}": keys must only contain letters, numbers, underscores, @, dots, and hyphens
config.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard and continue?
config.mustBeObject: JSON must be an object, not an array, primitive, or null
config.noSecretManager: No appropriate secret manager found. Cannot manage secrets securely.
config.invalidSecretName: Invalid secret name: must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
config.visual.title: Wave AI Modes - Visual Editor
secrets.emptyDesc: Add a secret to get started
secrets.name: Secret Name
secrets.nameHint: Must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
secrets.securityNote: The current secret value is not shown by default for security purposes.
launcher.title: Widget Launcher
launcher.noResults: No widgets found. Press Escape to clear search.
help.title: Help
process.title: Processes
tsunami.errorPath: App path or app ID must be set (tsunami:apppath or tsunami:appid)
durable.standardDesc: Standard SSH sessions end when the connection drops. Durable sessions keep your shell state, running programs, and history alive through network changes, computer sleep, and Wave restarts.
durable.attachedDesc: Your shell state, running programs, and history are protected. This session will survive network disconnects.
durable.detachedDesc: Connection lost, but your session is still running on the remote server. Wave will automatically reconnect when the connection is restored.
durable.awaitingConnectionDesc: Configured for a durable session. The session will start when the connection is established.
durable.awaitingStartDesc: Configured for a durable session, but session hasn't started yet. Click below to start it manually.
durable.endedDesc: The durable session has ended. This block is still configured for durable sessions.
durable.endedExitedDesc: The shell was terminated and is no longer running. This block is still configured for durable sessions.
durable.endedLostDesc: The session was lost or not found on the remote server. This may have occurred due to a system reboot or the session being manually terminated.
durable.failedToStartDesc: The durable session failed to start.
onboarding.supportDesc: We're <0>open source</0>, <1>open-model</1>, and committed to providing a free terminal for individual users. Please show your support by giving us a star on <2>Github (wavetermdev/waveterm)</2>
onboarding.joinDesc: Get help, submit feature requests, report bugs, or just chat with fellow terminal enthusiasts.
onboarding.telemetryDesc: Anonymous usage data helps us improve features you use.
onboarding.noProblem: No problem, we respect your privacy.
onboarding.flyingBlind: But, without usage data, we're flying blind. A GitHub star helps us know Wave is useful and worth maintaining.
onboarding.features.ai.title: Wave AI
onboarding.features.ai.desc: Wave AI is your terminal assistant with context. I can read your terminal output, analyze widgets, read/write files, and help you solve problems faster.
onboarding.features.ai.tip1: Toggle the Wave AI panel with the AI button in the header (top left)
onboarding.features.ai.tip2: Or use the keyboard shortcut ... to quickly toggle
onboarding.features.ai.tip3: Bring your own API keys or run local models with Ollama, LM Studio, and other OpenAI-compatible providers
onboarding.features.magnify.title: Magnify Blocks
onboarding.features.magnify.desc1: Magnify any block to focus on what matters. Expand terminals, editors, and previews for a better view.
onboarding.features.magnify.desc2: Use the magnify feature to work with complex outputs and large files more efficiently.
onboarding.features.magnify.desc3: You can also magnify a block by clicking on the icon in the block header.
onboarding.features.magnify.shortcut: A quick {{key}}-M to magnify and another {{key}}-M to unmagnify
onboarding.features.files.title: Viewing/Editing Files
onboarding.features.files.desc1: Wave can preview markdown, images, and video files on both local and remote machines.
onboarding.features.files.desc2: Use wsh view [filename] to preview files in Wave's graphical viewer
onboarding.features.files.desc3: Use wsh edit [filename] to open config files or code files in Wave's graphical editor
onboarding.features.files.desc4: These commands work seamlessly on both local and remote machines, making it easy to view and edit files wherever they are.
onboarding.shortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
onboarding.shortcuts.switchTabsDesc: Press {{modKey}} + Number (1-9) to quickly switch between tabs.
onboarding.shortcuts.navigateBlocksDesc1: Use Ctrl-Shift + Arrow Keys (←→↑↓) to move between blocks in the current tab.
onboarding.shortcuts.navigateBlocksDesc2: Use Ctrl-Shift + Number (1-9) to focus a specific block by its position.
quicktips.wshPreview: Preview files, directories, or web URLs
quicktips.tabTip: Tabs — Right click any tab to change backgrounds or rename.
quicktips.webViewTip: Web View — Click the gear in the web view to set your homepage
quicktips.terminalTip: Terminal — Click the gear in the terminal to set your terminal theme and font size
preview.name: Name
preview.overwriteDesc: This copy operation will overwrite an existing file. Would you like to continue?
web.title: Web
web.clearCookies: Clear Cookies and Storage (All Web Widgets)
web.noBookmarksDesc: Edit your bookmarks.json file to configure bookmarks.
aifilediff.title: AI Diff Viewer
aifilediff.missingChatId: Missing chatId or toolCallId in block metadata
aifilediff.missingFileName: Missing file name in block metadata
aifilediff.noDiffData: No diff data returned from server
lang.title: Language
